title: rare pink dolphin
description: a resource pack that add a rare pink dolphin variant
body:
a resource pack that add a rare pink dolphin variant that will be only 5% of all dolphins

## this resource pack require using the folowing mods:

[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

or optifine
